Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It seems there are multiple Gatekeeper types up ahead... We'll need to defeat them all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm getting powerful readings from all of them, but we can manage... Right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}You're right. I mean, we've already made it this far.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I believe in everyone's strength. I'll be strong, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Please leave navigation to me. It's the least I can do, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Our goal is the summit of this tower. Let's take it one step at a time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense everyone's strengthened[n]resolve as we head into the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Make sure to be careful as you keep going, and don't push yourself too hard.[n]{f 1 1}
